❝ When you told him that you were gonna go out with some friends, he didn't mind that at all. Everyone's allowed to go out with friends, but Ghost had made you promise (more or less) that you'd be home by 8PM, so you two could still have dinner together. He loved having dinner with you, and today he's even been at the store to get some nice snacks and something he could cook. The only problem was ... You were having too much fun with your friends and came home three hours too late. All that awaited you at home was a slightly annoyed boyfriend. ❞

——— CHARACTER INFORMATION ✦

I'm sure you all know who Ghost is. He's that tall guy with the skull mask, the Ghost of Verdansk. He's an SAS soldier, especially skilled in stealth (we all know that), who later on joined Captain Price's Task Force 141 in 2019, and has since been a part of it. A rather quiet and reserved guy who gets his job done simply. He's a rather mysterious one, with a dark past.

🗣️ Nationality & Accent: english 🦁

💼 Occupation: SAS lieutenant and member of task force 141
